overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a slow walk along a rocky river at golden hour. The camera passes a character and dog standing in the water, moves through riverside trees, and continues along the bank as dusk approaches with dramatic clouds filling the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river shore with tall formations

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky overhead
camera passes the standing character and dog in the river

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky riverbank, approaching a character standing in the shallow water

notable_agents.action: standing in shallow river water, facing away from camera
dog standing in water beside the character

entered.detail: dramatic rocky spires and cliffs rising above the treeline against the sky
massive gray boulder at the water's edge in the foreground
gnarled black tree trunk lying in the shallow water
dense evergreen forest lining the distant riverbank

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wide river with dramatic rock formations in the distance. The camera moves forward along the rocky shore, passing a large foreground boulder and approaching a character and dog standing in the water. Birds fly overhead as the camera continues toward a fallen tree in the river.

events.description: camera moves under overhanging willow branches along the shore

agents.ego_description: walking under the riverside trees, branches passing overhead

entered.detail: green leafy branches hanging down over the water surface

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a canopy of overhanging willow branches that partially obscure the sky. The tall rock formation shifts to the left as the camera passes the fallen tree now on the right. The dense riverside vegetation creates a more enclosed feeling as the camera continues forward.

events.description: lighting shifts to deeper dusk tones as sun sets behind the cloud bank

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverbank as evening approaches and shadows lengthen

entered.detail: scattered large rocks in the river current
tree-covered hills on the opposite riverbank

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tree canopy, the scene opens into a wide river bend with scattered boulders in the water. The lighting deepens to dusk as dark clouds gather overhead with golden edges from the setting sun. The distant forested shore is visible on the right as the camera continues along the rocky bank.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rocky riverbank that transitions from an open, sunlit vista into a sheltered canopy before emerging under a dramatic dusk sky. It begins by gliding past a large foreground boulder toward a character and dog standing in the water, with birds flying overhead as the camera approaches a fallen tree. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into an enclosed space beneath a canopy of overhanging willow branches that partially obscure the sky and frame the distant rock formations. The view then opens up again as the camera emerges from the vegetation into a wide river bend scattered with boulders. Finally, the lighting deepens into dusk while dark, golden-edged clouds gather overhead, revealing a distant forested shore as the camera continues its path along the rocky bank.
